title: OB1 Clear All Weather Repair Tape Extreme Strength - Ultra Strong Waterproof Duct Tape - Maximum Bond Strength - Heat, Water & UV Resistant - Indoor & Outdoor Use - 50mm x 20m Roll
features: ULTRA STRONG & DURABLE: Engineered with extreme strength for heavy-duty repairs, ensuring a long-lasting hold on a variety of surfaces.
ALL-WEATHER PERFORMANCE: Fully waterproof and resistant to heat, water, and UV rays; performs reliably in temperatures from -10°C to +75°C, ideal for use in any season.
MAXIMUM BOND STRENGTH: Delivers superior adhesion for both smooth and rough surfaces, making it reliable for critical repairs.
VERSATILE APPLICATION: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use—perfect for home, automotive, construction, and emergency fixes.
GENEROUS SIZE: Comes in a 50mm x 20m roll, offering excellent coverage for large and multiple repair jobs.
CONTENTS: 1 x OB1 Extreme Repair Tape Clear.
